title: Responsive viewport and screenshot validation
summary: Add automated responsive layout evidence for required windowed/fullscreen viewport sizes and bilingual UI states.
acceptance: Checks no core UI clipping, incoherent overlap, missing key information or unreachable scroll regions
Runs checks in zh-CN and en or records a verified limitation with mitigation
Produces screenshot or DOM-layout artifacts suitable for reviewer inspection
Does not weaken existing E2E or benchmark gates

history.details: Created by WM-0111 M8 UI/i18n scope amendment DAG; remains proposed until dependencies are done.

Validated Web/Desktop M8 responsive viewport matrix across 1280x720, 1366x768, 1424x861, 1600x900, 1920x1080, 2560x1369 and 2560x1440; added bilingual DOM-layout artifacts and reviewer screenshots; required checks passed

verified: No blocking findings; independently reran Web/Desktop responsive E2E, quality, handoff, workflow validate/status and diff checks. Full 7-viewport Web/Desktop bilingual start/HUD matrix plus explicit debug diagnostics path artifacts confirmed.
Integrated verified responsive viewport matrix evidence; checks passed: handoff validate, taskctl validate/status, diff check, quality; reviewer independently reran Web/Desktop E2E.

review.summary: No blocking findings; independently reran Web/Desktop responsive E2E, quality, handoff, workflow validate/status and diff checks. Full 7-viewport Web/Desktop bilingual start/HUD matrix plus explicit debug diagnostics path artifacts confirmed.

integration.summary: Integrated verified responsive viewport matrix evidence; checks passed: handoff validate, taskctl validate/status, diff check, quality; reviewer independently reran Web/Desktop E2E.
